types.description: Medicines and supplements used for menstrual pain relief, cycle regulation, and menstrual discomfort.

name: Chronic Conditions
description: Medicines and treatments used for long-term management of chronic health conditions such as allergies, diabetes, high blood pressure, thyroid disorders, and more.

types.description: Medications and supplements to manage and relieve symptoms of allergic reactions, including seasonal allergies and sensitivities.

types.description: Medicines and remedies to relieve symptoms of cold and flu, such as congestion, fever, and cough.

name: Skin & Hairs
description: Medicines, treatments, and care products for maintaining healthy skin and hair, managing conditions like acne, hair loss, eczema, and wound care.

types.name: Acne
types.description: Medications and topical treatments to manage and prevent acne, reduce inflammation, and promote clearer skin.

types.description: Medications and creams to relieve itching caused by skin conditions or allergies.

types.description: Treatments and topical therapies to manage psoriasis symptoms including scaling, redness, and inflammation.

types.name: Rosacea
types.description: Medications and topical care to reduce redness, inflammation, and breakouts associated with rosacea.

types.name: Wound Care
types.description: Medications and dressings to promote healing of cuts, scrapes, and minor wounds while preventing infections.
